name: godplans
description: Plan everything before anything. A single-command AI agent skill that produces a complete, audit-proof, agent-executable master plan (PLAN.mdx) for a software project before any code is written.
author: aihxp (https://github.com/aihxp)

scripts.postpack: echo 'Install the skill with: sh install.sh (or npx skills add aihxp/godplans)'
